features.name: metamagicOptions
features.safe_summary: metamagicOptions feature needs DM content.
features.rules_summary: metamagicOptions feature needs DM content.

features.name: Innate Sorcery
features.recovery: Regain all uses on a Long Rest.

grants_actions.name: Innate Sorcery
grants_actions.summary: As a Bonus Action, enter a heightened magical state for 1 minute. While active, you have Advantage on the spell attack rolls of Sorcerer spells you cast, and the spell save DC of your Sorcerer spells increases by 1.

features.safe_summary: As a Bonus Action, enter a heightened magical state for 1 minute. While active, you have Advantage on the spell attack rolls of Sorcerer spells you cast, and the spell save DC of your Sorcerer spells increases by 1.
features.rules_summary: As a Bonus Action, enter a heightened magical state for 1 minute. While active, you have Advantage on the spell attack rolls of Sorcerer spells you cast, and the spell save DC of your Sorcerer spells increases by 1.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.safe_summary: You cast Sorcerer spells using Charisma. You know a fixed number of spells (no daily preparation) and cast them using the Sorcerer spell slot table.
features.rules_summary: You cast Sorcerer spells using Charisma. You know a fixed number of spells (no daily preparation) and cast them using the Sorcerer spell slot table.

features.name: Font of Magic
features.recovery: Regain all Sorcery Points on a Long Rest.
features.safe_summary: You have a pool of Sorcery Points equal to your Sorcerer level. Spend them to power Flexible Casting and Metamagic. Regain all Sorcery Points on a Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: You have a pool of Sorcery Points equal to your Sorcerer level. Spend them to power Flexible Casting and Metamagic. Regain all Sorcery Points on a Long Rest.

features.name: Flexible Casting
features.recovery: Sorcery Points refresh on a Long Rest.
features.safe_summary: Spend Sorcery Points to create spell slots, or sacrifice a spell slot to gain Sorcery Points equal to the slot's level.
features.rules_summary: Spend Sorcery Points to create spell slots, or sacrifice a spell slot to gain Sorcery Points equal to the slot's level.

features.name: Sorcerous Origin
features.safe_summary: Choose your Sorcerous Origin subclass at 3rd level. This defines the source of your innate magic and grants subclass features at levels 3, 6, 14, and 18.
features.rules_summary: Choose your Sorcerous Origin subclass at 3rd level. This defines the source of your innate magic and grants subclass features at levels 3, 6, 14, and 18.

features.name: Metamagic
features.recovery: Metamagic spends Sorcery Points, which refresh on a Long Rest.
features.safe_summary: You gain 2 Metamagic options at 3rd level (and 1 more at 10th and 17th). Spend Sorcery Points when you cast a spell to apply a Metamagic effect.
features.rules_summary: You gain 2 Metamagic options at 3rd level (and 1 more at 10th and 17th). Spend Sorcery Points when you cast a spell to apply a Metamagic effect.

features.name: Sorcerous Restoration
features.safe_summary: When you finish a Short Rest, you regain 4 expended Sorcery Points.
features.rules_summary: When you finish a Short Rest, you regain 4 expended Sorcery Points.

features.name: Sorcery Incarnate
features.recovery: Innate Sorcery uses refresh on a Long Rest; Sorcery Points refresh on a Long Rest.
features.safe_summary: While Innate Sorcery is active, you can use up to 2 Metamagic options simultaneously on a single spell (instead of 1). Additionally, if you have no uses of Innate Sorcery remaining, you can spend 2 Sorcery Points to use it.
features.rules_summary: While Innate Sorcery is active, you can use up to 2 Metamagic options simultaneously on a single spell (instead of 1). Additionally, if you have no uses of Innate Sorcery remaining, you can spend 2 Sorcery Points to use it.

features.name: sorcerer-l18-1
features.safe_summary: Your mastery of raw magic reaches a rarefied peak where high-end casting feels effortless and overwhelming.
features.rules_summary: Your mastery of raw magic reaches a rarefied peak where high-end casting feels effortless and overwhelming.

features.name: sorcerer-l20-1
features.safe_summary: Your apotheosis sharpens even further, turning your innate magic into something close to a living magical phenomenon.
features.rules_summary: Your apotheosis sharpens even further, turning your innate magic into something close to a living magical phenomenon.

features.name: Metamagic (3rd Option)
features.recovery: Metamagic spends Sorcery Points, which refresh on a Long Rest.
features.safe_summary: You learn one additional Metamagic option from the full list, bringing your total to 3 known Metamagic options.
features.rules_summary: You learn one additional Metamagic option from the full list, bringing your total to 3 known Metamagic options.

features.name: sorcerer-l17-2
features.recovery: Metamagic spends Sorcery Points, which refresh on a long rest.
features.safe_summary: Expand your Metamagic toolkit with one more way to bend spell delivery.
features.rules_summary: Expand your Metamagic toolkit with one more way to bend spell delivery.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (maximum 20), or take a feat.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (maximum 20), or take a feat.

features.name: Cantrips Known: 5
features.safe_summary: You learn one additional Sorcerer cantrip, bringing your total to 5 cantrips known.
features.rules_summary: You learn one additional Sorcerer cantrip, bringing your total to 5 cantrips known.

features.name: Sorcerous Origin Feature
features.safe_summary: Your Sorcerous Origin grants you an additional subclass feature at 6th level.
features.rules_summary: Your Sorcerous Origin grants you an additional subclass feature at 6th level.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (maximum 20), or take a feat.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (maximum 20), or take a feat.

features.name: 5th-Level Spells
features.safe_summary: You gain access to 5th-level spell slots and can learn 5th-level Sorcerer spells.
features.rules_summary: You gain access to 5th-level spell slots and can learn 5th-level Sorcerer spells.

features.name: sorcerer-l10-2
features.safe_summary: Your cantrip list expands again to six known cantrips.
features.rules_summary: Your cantrip list expands again to six known cantrips.

features.name: sorcerer-l11-1
features.safe_summary: You unlock 6th-level spells and access to high-impact arcane effects.
features.rules_summary: You unlock 6th-level spells and access to high-impact arcane effects.

features.name: sorcerer-l12-1
features.safe_summary: Another Ability Score Improvement or feat to refine your late-midgame build.
features.rules_summary: Another Ability Score Improvement or feat to refine your late-midgame build.

features.name: sorcerer-l13-1
features.safe_summary: You unlock 7th-level spells for stronger control, utility, and burst options.
features.rules_summary: You unlock 7th-level spells for stronger control, utility, and burst options.

features.name: sorcerer-l14-1
features.safe_summary: Your Sorcerous Origin gains another subclass-defining feature.
features.rules_summary: Your Sorcerous Origin gains another subclass-defining feature.

features.name: sorcerer-l15-1
features.safe_summary: You unlock 8th-level spells and another major spellcasting tier jump.
features.rules_summary: You unlock 8th-level spells and another major spellcasting tier jump.

features.name: sorcerer-l15-2
features.safe_summary: Your Sorcerous Origin advances again with its high-level subclass feature.
features.rules_summary: Your Sorcerous Origin advances again with its high-level subclass feature.

features.name: sorcerer-l16-1
features.safe_summary: Another Ability Score Improvement or feat strengthens your endgame casting profile.
features.rules_summary: Another Ability Score Improvement or feat strengthens your endgame casting profile.

features.name: sorcerer-l17-1
features.safe_summary: You unlock 9th-level spells, the highest tier of arcane casting.
features.rules_summary: You unlock 9th-level spells, the highest tier of arcane casting.

features.name: sorcerer-l19-1
features.safe_summary: Gain an Epic Boon as a late-game power reinforcement.
features.rules_summary: Gain an Epic Boon as a late-game power reinforcement.
